SOP.title: PPC Management SOP
SOP.description: Amazon Ads — keyword research, campaign structuring, bid & budget optimization, reporting.

steps.step_description: Identify high-converting, relevant keywords from tools and competitor ASINs.
Analyze competitors to understand their content approach, pricing, reviews, and keyword targeting for better positioning.
Decide the campaign goal — ranking, sales velocity, or profitability.
Allocate budget across campaigns.
Decide the use of Broad, Phrase, and Exact match based on the launch or scale phase.
Define naming conventions, ad groups, budgets, and targeting type.
Create Sponsored Products campaigns — manual and auto.
Block poor-performing search terms.
Adjust bids based on performance — ACOS, CVR, CPC.
Adjust Top-of-Search or Product Page placement multipliers.
Shift budgets toward high-performing campaigns.
Monitor performance metrics like spend, ACOS, CTR, and CVR.
Create performance reports for internal and client review.
Set time-based bid adjustments.
Analyze overall PPC performance to find gaps, wasted spend, or scaling opportunities.

Best Practice.title: Manage to TACOS, not just ACOS
Best Practice.description: Campaign-level ACOS shows whether one campaign is efficient, but TACOS (ad spend ÷ total revenue) shows whether advertising is actually growing the business or just renting sales. Track both weekly, and treat a rising TACOS against flat total sales as the trigger for a full account audit.

KPI.title: ACOS by lifecycle phase
KPI.description: Industry-benchmark advertising cost of sale, indexed to campaign phase. A healthy blended TACOS sits well below ACOS once organic rank is established.

SOP.title: Assessment SOP
SOP.description: Read the notification, isolate the root cause, and size up the odds before any documents are requested.

steps.step_description: Understand the reason for the account suspension.
Get details on performance notifications and violations.
Determine whether the issue is IP, related accounts, authenticity, etc. by checking the specific violation type.
Evaluate the likelihood of reinstatement.
Define what documents are needed.
High, Medium, or Low, based on urgency and risk.
Written using ChatGPT suggestions.

Best Practice.title: Treat Account Health as a weekly operations function, not incident response
Best Practice.description: Reviewing Account Health only after a notification arrives means the damage is already done. Check the dashboard weekly, and answer every warning within 24-48 hours with a Plan of Action that names root cause, corrective action, and prevention.

KPI.title: Account Health Rating (AHR)
KPI.description: Amazon's 0-1,000 composite compliance score. 200+ is Healthy; below 100 carries high deactivation risk.

SOP.title: Reinstatement SOP
SOP.description: Account-level appeal: document collection through Amazon follow-up, to a closed case.

steps.step_description: Request invoices, utility bills, ID, and other supporting documents.
Check completeness, authenticity, and match with the ASIN.
Write the appeal based on the violation type and available documents.
Proofreading and policy compliance check.
Submit via the account interface.
Monitor for Amazon's reply.
Provide extra documents or a revised appeal.
Notify the client of success or next steps.

Best Practice.title: Mirror Amazon's own POA structure exactly
Best Practice.description: Appeals that clearly separate root cause, corrective action, and preventive action move faster through review than narrative appeals. Never submit a revised appeal without directly addressing the specific reason for the prior rejection.

KPI.title: Appeal response SLA
KPI.description: Typical Amazon turnaround per submission round; track actual case time against it to flag stalled cases for escalation.

SOP.title: ASIN Assessment SOP
SOP.description: The listing-level counterpart to Assessment — isolate why a specific ASIN was suppressed.

steps.step_description: Review the Amazon Performance Notification for ASIN codes.
IP, restricted product, authenticity, etc.
Review title, images, and backend fields.
Analyze reviews for complaints.
Review Voice of the Customer for the flagged ASIN and FBA/FBM returns.
Review documents to establish authenticity.
Assess the root violation source.
Report with findings and suggestions.

Best Practice.title: Read the suppression notice line by line before touching the listing
Best Practice.description: Amazon's ASIN notifications are frequently vague about the exact trigger. Cross-check listing history, VOC, and returns data against the stated violation type before assuming what needs to change.

KPI.title: ASIN reactivation time
KPI.description: Time from suppression notice to a reinstated, sellable ASIN; the tighter this window, the less lost sales velocity and ranking.

SOP.title: ASIN Reinstatement SOP
SOP.description: Listing-level appeal: document validation through resubmission, to a closed client update.

steps.step_description: Ask for invoice, Certificate of Authenticity, brand authorization, etc.
Check supplier info and matching product details.
Detail the root cause plus corrective and preventive actions.
Based on the POA and violation type.
Upload documents and the appeal.
Track case updates.
Modify and resend the appeal.
Inform the client of the resolution or next steps.

Best Practice.title: Route document requests through one channel per case
Best Practice.description: Centralize every document request through a single shared drive folder or cdocs@spctek.com thread per case, so nothing is lost across email chains and the appeal draft always references the latest version.

KPI.title: Amazon response window
KPI.description: Time Amazon typically takes to respond to a submitted ASIN appeal before a follow-up is warranted.

SOP.title: SPN Escalation SOP
SOP.description: When a case outgrows standard appeal channels — escalating through the Solution Provider Network.

steps.step_description: Move a complex, stalled, or high-impact case into the SPN escalation channel.

Best Practice.title: Escalate with a complete internal file, not a summary
Best Practice.description: SPN reps move faster when the full assessment report, all prior submissions, and a clear ask are attached at first contact, rather than triaging a case in stages.

KPI.title: Escalation resolution time
KPI.description: Time from SPN log to a substantive response from the assigned Amazon rep.

SOP.title: A+ Content SOP
SOP.description: A+ Content, storefronts, listing imagery, and brand story — the visual and narrative layer of the listing.

steps.step_description: Create a sample design to align with the client's goals and brand theme.
Backend tags for SEO and better visibility.
Preparing the content draft.
Develop a comprehensive shot list — hero shot, scale images, in-use lifestyle photos, close-ups, and compatibility shots
Establish visual hierarchy with consistent typography, font sizes, and bolding

Best Practice.title: Front-load the first 2-3 modules for mobile
Best Practice.description: Most shoppers never scroll past the third module on mobile. Put the highest-impact visual and the strongest differentiator there, not the brand story.

KPI.title: A+ Content conversion lift
KPI.description: Typical conversion-rate lift attributable to well-built A+ Content versus no A+ Content at all.

SOP.title: Storefront Creation SOP
SOP.description: A+ Content, storefronts, listing imagery, and brand story — the visual and narrative layer of the listing.

steps.step_description: Menu and page selection.
Choose the best products to showcase on the homepage and category pages.
Backend tags for SEO and better visibility.
Keyword research and content drafting; the designer builds the layout for approval.
Keep a consistent aesthetic across all images and banners
Creative designing, posting, and publishing; once approved, content is posted on Amazon.

Best Practice.title: Map the page hierarchy to one storefront goal
Best Practice.description: A storefront trying to do brand discovery, launches, and cross-sell all on the homepage dilutes all three. Pick one primary goal and build the navigation and grid around it.

KPI.title: Storefront session conversion rate
KPI.description: No official Amazon-published storefront benchmark exists; track against your own listing-level CVR band as the baseline.

SOP.title: Listing Images SOP
SOP.description: A+ Content, storefronts, listing imagery, and brand story — the visual and narrative layer of the listing.

steps.step_description: Competitor research and market analysis.
Keyword research and content draft.
Idea generation, reference, and guidance for images.
Creative designing, posting, and publishing.

Best Practice.title: Map every image to one customer question
Best Practice.description: Each of the seven image slots should answer a specific question a shopper has — scale, in-use, what's included — rather than repeating the hero shot from a different angle.

KPI.title: Main image compliance & CTR contribution
KPI.description: Main image must meet Amazon's pure-white-background and 85%-of-frame rule; well-optimized image sets are consistently linked to the top of the category CVR band.

SOP.title: Brand Story SOP
SOP.description: A+ Content, storefronts, listing imagery, and brand story — the visual and narrative layer of the listing.

steps.step_description: Competitor research and market analysis.
Keyword research and content draft; keywords are reused in the content draft.
Creative designing, posting, and publishing; once approved, content is posted on Amazon.

Best Practice.title: Use brand story for context the listing can't carry
Best Practice.description: Don't repeat product benefits already in the bullets or A+ Content — use brand story space for founder story, mission, and credibility cues that build trust rather than restating features.

KPI.title: New, non-duplicated visual assets
KPI.description: Share of brand story imagery that does not reuse any asset from the main listing images or A+ Content.

SOP.title: Listing Creation SOP
SOP.description: Building a listing from keyword research to flat file, then auditing it against the standard.

steps.step_description: Find high-volume, relevant search terms to use in the listing.
Analyze top listings for strategy, content, reviews, etc.
Identify key selling features from product catalogs, competitor reviews, or factory sheets.
Create keyword-rich, readable product titles.
Write clear, benefit-driven bullets with keywords.
Write the HTML or plain description with branding, features, and story.
Fill out the backend search terms.
Fill out backend attributes such as item form.
Assign the most accurate category / item type.
Populate and submit Amazon flat files.
Review, troubleshoot errors, and submit the listing.

Best Practice.title: Backend keywords: bytes, not characters
Best Practice.description: The backend search-terms field is measured in UTF-8 bytes, not characters — accented characters and symbols cost more than one byte each. Go one byte over and Amazon silently drops the entire field from indexing, with no warning.

KPI.title: Backend search terms byte limit
KPI.description: Maximum backend keyword field size before Amazon stops indexing the field entirely.

SOP.title: Listing Audit SOP
SOP.description: Building a listing from keyword research to flat file, then auditing it against the standard.

steps.step_description: Analysis performed per SOP.
Title length 80–150 characters, mobile-optimized, per internal SOP
All 5 bullets should use close to 200 characters each
Modular layout with a balanced mix of image and text modules
Analyze good and bad reviews to improve product description and quality.
Check whether the listing is in the right category.
Review pricing of similar products in the market.

Best Practice.title: Audit against the current standard, not last year's listing
Best Practice.description: Amazon's image, title, and A+ policies tighten regularly — a listing that passed audit a year ago can silently drift out of compliance. Re-check every listing against the current character limits and image rules, not the version on file.

KPI.title: Review rating & volume floor
KPI.description: Minimum rating and review count the internal SOP treats as healthy before flagging a listing for improvement work.

SOP.title: A/B Testing SOP
SOP.description: Amazon's native Manage Your Experiments tool, plus a manual protocol for products that don't qualify.

steps.step_title: Content Variations — A+ Content, Bullets, Title, Images
steps.step_description: Create listing content per previous listing practices, with multiple variations built to highlight specific product features based on market analysis and demand.
Create multiple variations by pack size, color, or combination to offer in the market.
Test both versions of the content above to compare outcomes.
Define the number of weeks for the testing phase.
Set the objective — high clicks, sessions, conversions, or seasonal offering.
Analyze sales, conversions, and sessions against the different offerings.
Review top-performing content and implement it; where there's a tie, decide which is more relevant.
For generic products, apply testing manually and sequentially over a defined duration.

Best Practice.title: One variable per test, never stop early
Best Practice.description: Changing the title and the main image in the same experiment makes the result unreadable. Let Amazon's Manage Your Experiments tool run to its full duration even if one variant looks ahead early — early leads regularly reverse.

KPI.title: Statistical significance & test duration
KPI.description: Confidence level and minimum run time Amazon's Manage Your Experiments tool needs before a result is trustworthy.

SOP.title: Product Hunting SOP
SOP.description: Opportunity research across Amazon's own tools, Helium 10, Alibaba, and the existing supplier network.

steps.step_description: Prepare a checklist covering source price, categories, sizes, manual vs. electric, budget, and marketplace.
Collect data to analyze product niches and ideation from Amazon's own tool — growing demand, sales, pricing, and return rate.
Collect product data from Amazon's top-selling products to find opportunities and product ideas.
Gather a list of products per the product criteria.
Connect with the current supplier network and review their catalogs for new product ideas and demand.
See product trends on Google Trends and Opportunity Explorer; correlate yearly trends with future demand.
Alibaba, Made-in-China, 1688, Tradewheel.
Review new product releases and niches on Alibaba, compiling stats and pricing estimates.
Develop product market segmentation of the top 20 sellers to identify demand, dominance, prices, materials, and variations.
Compile a complete product report summarizing the selection
Get initial product estimates for a minimum of 500 units with tentative landing costs to derive launch profitability.

Best Practice.title: Cap sourcing price at 20% of intended sale price
Best Practice.description: Before committing to a product, confirm unit sourcing cost — before FBA fees, referral fees, and ad spend — leaves enough margin. Sourcing above roughly a fifth of the intended Amazon sale price rarely survives the full fee stack.

KPI.title: Sourcing cost ceiling
KPI.description: Maximum unit sourcing cost as a share of the intended Amazon sale price, before FBA/referral/ad fees are layered on.

SOP.title: Product Sourcing SOP
SOP.description: Vetting suppliers, gathering quotes, testing samples, and locking in the contract.

steps.step_description: List specific needs for the product to be sourced — material, MOQ, target price, design, packaging, colors, size, etc.
Identify the best sourcing location for the finalized product.
Identify supplier trustworthiness, communication, and capability.
Get the best quotes at or below the target price from manufacturers and factories.
Get physical samples of the product before placing the order.
Draft a contract between supplier and buyer to define accurate, timely outcomes.

Best Practice.title: Verified, Trade Assurance suppliers only on Alibaba
Best Practice.description: Confirm Verified Supplier status and Trade Assurance coverage before sending deposits — it's the difference between a recoverable dispute and a lost payment if the supplier doesn't deliver to spec.

KPI.title: Minimum competing quotes
KPI.description: Minimum number of supplier quotes gathered before selecting a manufacturing partner.

SOP.title: Price Optimization SOP
SOP.description: Competitor benchmarking, margin math, automated repricing, and impact analysis.

steps.step_description: Understand competitor pricing benchmarks, floor and ceiling pricing, seasonal fluctuations, and pricing trends.
Calculate profit margin based on COGS, platform fees, etc.
Calculate breakeven based on COGS and the roadmap.
Set up volume/quantity discounts for B2B while remaining profitable.
Based on competitor analysis, define pricing logic per goal — undercut competitor, maximize margin, or maintain Buy Box.
Structure and upload price updates via flat file or template.
Fix suppressed listings due to pricing violations — floor or ceiling.
Measure the impact of price changes on sales velocity, Buy Box win %, and conversions.
Use sales data to determine average daily sell-through per SKU.

Best Practice.title: Set a profit floor before turning on automation
Best Practice.description: Automated repricing without a hard profit-margin floor will chase the Buy Box straight through your margin. Set the floor and ceiling first, then let the rule set compete within them.

KPI.title: Buy Box win rate
KPI.description: Healthy Buy Box win rate depends heavily on competitive density; private-label/exclusive listings should sit far above resale or wholesale listings.

SOP.title: Inventory Management SOP
SOP.description: Forecasting, safety stock, IPI health, and reimbursement — keeping FBA inventory efficient.

steps.step_description: Based on velocity and lead time, forecast restock dates and quantity per SKU.
Set safe inventory levels per product based on seasonality and risk.
Identify SKUs that may incur fees due to low fulfillment-center availability.
Flag ASINs with stagnant or overstocked inventory that needs action.
Track Amazon's Inventory Performance Index and proactively act on alerts — stranded, excess, removals.
Select SKUs for removal and create removal orders before fees apply.
Identify lost, damaged, or uncredited inventory and raise cases.

Best Practice.title: Resolve red-flag IPI issues weekly, don't wait for the monthly score
Best Practice.description: IPI is a lagging indicator — by the time the monthly score drops, the excess or stranded inventory driving it has been accruing storage fees for weeks. Check the dashboard weekly and clear flags as they appear.

KPI.title: Inventory Performance Index (IPI)
KPI.description: Amazon's inventory health score; scores below 400 put storage limits and restock caps at risk.

SOP.title: Creator Connection SOP
SOP.description: Influencer and UGC campaigns end-to-end — goal, commission, outreach, samples, and ROI.

steps.step_description: Establish the purpose — brand awareness, sales push, UGC, etc.

steps.step_title: Finalize the Commission to Be Offered
steps.step_description: Determine and document the percentage or fixed rate to offer.

steps.step_title: Selection of Products to Be Enrolled
steps.step_description: Pick products that are visually appealing or seasonally relevant.
Draft 3–5 key selling points or storylines for the influencer to follow.
Set up the campaign inside Amazon's Creator Connection dashboard.

steps.step_title: Connect and Discuss with the Influencers
steps.step_description: Message influencers, agree on terms, and confirm participation.
Package and ship products with tracking and delivery confirmation.
Track progress and extend duration if needed to meet KPIs.
Save influencer videos for ads, PDPs, or social proof.
Report total sales, impressions, cost per sale, ROI, etc.

Best Practice.title: Price commission by category tier, not a flat rate
Best Practice.description: A flat commission across the catalog either overpays commodity SKUs or underpays the lifestyle/premium products that actually need creator storytelling. Tier the rate to category and content complexity.

KPI.title: Creator commission rate
KPI.description: Typical commission range paid to creators through Amazon's managed Creator Connections program, by category tier.

SOP.title: Walmart Connect Advertising SOP
SOP.description: Sponsored Search, Sponsored Video, and Onsite Display campaigns run through Walmart Connect.

steps.step_description: Use Walmart's search term reports and category browsing to build branded, generic, and competitor keyword clusters before launch.
Structure Sponsored Products campaigns by match type and objective, mirroring the Amazon ranking/scale/profit phase model.
Set bids toward a target ROAS (1 / target ACOS) and shift budget toward SKUs converting above the category average.
Export Walmart Connect reports weekly and track ROAS, ACOS, and attributed sales share against the account goal.

Best Practice.title: Budget for a longer ramp than Amazon
Best Practice.description: Walmart Connect campaigns typically need 45-90 days to accumulate enough data to optimize meaningfully, versus Amazon's faster feedback loop — don't judge a campaign's viability before day 30.

KPI.title: Sponsored Products ROAS
KPI.description: Healthy return-on-ad-spend range for Walmart Connect Sponsored Products, which typically runs more efficient than Amazon per dollar for CPG/grocery categories.

SOP.title: Seller Performance & Account Health SOP
SOP.description: Monitoring and defending the eight Walmart Seller Performance Standards.

steps.step_description: Check Cancellation Rate, On-Time Delivery, Valid Tracking Rate, Seller Response Rate, Negative Feedback, Return Rate, Item Not Received, and Late Shipment Rate from the Seller Center dashboard.
Action every performance notification immediately — Walmart does not allow unsubscribing from these, and unresolved alerts risk suppression.
Classify each miss as seller-accountable or non-accountable, and fix the underlying driver (carrier scan, ship location mismatch, etc.) rather than the symptom.
Submit a business plan of action for appealable suspensions; termination decisions cannot be appealed, so prevention is the only lever.

Best Practice.title: WFS removes most metrics except Negative Feedback
Best Practice.description: Sellers using Walmart Fulfillment Services automatically satisfy most performance standards — Negative Feedback Rate is the one metric WFS does not cover, so it deserves disproportionate attention.

KPI.title: On-Time Delivery Rate
KPI.description: Share of orders delivered on or before the Expected Delivery Date; the anchor metric for Walmart seller standing.

SOP.title: Listing & Content Optimization SOP
SOP.description: Item Setup content quality — titles, descriptions, images, and specs — for Walmart's search and Content Quality Score.

steps.step_description: Map high-intent search terms to the correct Walmart category and item type before building content.
Lead titles with brand and primary keyword, and write descriptions that cover use case and differentiators in scannable form.
Meet Walmart's main image and swatch requirements, and complete every relevant spec field to strengthen content quality scoring.
Audit listings against Walmart's Item Spec Health Check output and fix any flagged gaps.

Best Practice.title: Complete every spec field, not just the required ones
Best Practice.description: Walmart's content quality scoring rewards completeness beyond the minimum required fields — more attributes populated means more ways for the listing to match a search query.

KPI.title: Item Spec / Content completeness
KPI.description: Share of applicable spec fields completed on the listing, a driver of both search relevance and content quality score.

SOP.title: Pricing & Promotions SOP
SOP.description: Competitive pricing and promotional setup on Walmart Marketplace.

steps.step_description: Benchmark price against the Buy-Box-equivalent featured offer for the same item on Walmart.com.
Set price floors and ceilings before enabling repricing rules, mirroring the Amazon pricing-automation safeguard.
Plan promotional pricing and Rollback events around inventory depth and margin floor.

Best Practice.title: Set the margin floor before repricing, not after
Best Practice.description: The same rule that protects Amazon pricing automation applies on Walmart — automated rules will chase the featured offer to the bottom without a hard floor set first.

KPI.title: Featured Offer win rate
KPI.description: Walmart's equivalent to Amazon's Buy Box — the share of page views where your offer is the one buyers can add to cart directly.

SOP.title: Promoted Listings & Advertising SOP
SOP.description: Standard and Advanced Promoted Listings campaigns inside eBay's ad platform.

steps.step_description: Set the Promoted Listings Standard ad rate based on category margin — thin-margin categories start at 2-4%, not eBay's default suggestion.
Choose Standard (percentage-of-sale, pay-on-conversion) or Advanced (cost-per-click) based on volume and margin.
Align titles and item specifics to Cassini's ranking signals so promoted and organic placement reinforce each other.
Track ad rate against post-fee margin weekly, and pause promotion on listings where it erases profit.

Best Practice.title: Only promote listings with margin to spare
Best Practice.description: A 15% ad rate — eBay's frequent default suggestion — erases profit on most thin-margin resale and flip inventory; reserve Promoted Listings for items with enough margin headroom to absorb it.

KPI.title: Promoted Listings ad rate
KPI.description: Percentage-of-sale-price fee range for Promoted Listings Standard campaigns.

SOP.title: Seller Performance & Top Rated Status SOP
SOP.description: Maintaining Top Rated Seller standing on eBay's monthly performance evaluation.

steps.step_description: Track transaction defect rate, late shipment rate, and cases closed without seller resolution against Top Rated thresholds monthly.
Upload valid, carrier-scanned tracking within the stated handling time on every order to protect the late shipment metric.
Resolve buyer cases directly and quickly — unresolved cases count against the defect rate even when the seller isn't at fault for the underlying issue.
Dispute any defect or late mark through Seller Help where valid tracking or carrier data supports an appeal.

Best Practice.title: Ship on time and track everything — it protects every metric at once
Best Practice.description: Late shipment rate, defect rate, and case rate are all downstream of the same root behaviors: ship inside handling time and always upload valid tracking. Fixing those two habits resolves most Top Rated risk before it starts.

KPI.title: Transaction defect rate
KPI.description: Share of transactions with a defect (late shipment, unresolved case, low rating); Top Rated Seller status requires this well below the baseline eBay standard.

SOP.title: Listing Optimization (Cassini SEO) SOP
SOP.description: Title, item specifics, and pricing strategy tuned to eBay's Cassini search algorithm.

steps.step_description: Front-load titles with the terms buyers actually search, and complete every relevant item specific — Cassini weighs specifics heavily in relevance matching.
Use multiple high-resolution photos and a scannable description structure to support both conversion and dwell-time signals.
Set Best Offer thresholds and auto-decline/accept rules that protect margin while keeping listings competitive on price-sensitive searches.

Best Practice.title: Treat Top Rated status as an SEO lever, not just a badge
Best Practice.description: Top Rated listings can rank 5-15 positions higher than an otherwise-identical non-Top-Rated competitor when other listing factors are equal — the badge is a ranking input, not just trust signaling.

KPI.title: Top Rated ranking lift
KPI.description: Typical Best Match ranking improvement attributable to Top Rated Seller status, all else equal.

SOP.title: Feedback & Returns Management SOP
SOP.description: Buyer feedback, Money Back Guarantee cases, and returns handling.

steps.step_description: Track feedback score and recent comments weekly, and respond professionally to any negative feedback.
Process return requests and Money Back Guarantee cases inside eBay's stated windows to avoid a case closing without seller resolution.
Respond to buyer messages within 24 hours — faster response is one of the most reliable levers across every performance metric.

Best Practice.title: Resolve cases before eBay decides them for you
Best Practice.description: A case that closes without seller resolution counts against Top Rated status even when eBay ultimately sides with the seller on the underlying issue — resolving proactively protects the metric regardless of fault.

KPI.title: Cases closed without seller resolution
KPI.description: Share of Money Back Guarantee cases that close without the seller's involvement; a core Top Rated Seller input.

SOP.title: Etsy Ads SOP
SOP.description: Etsy's onsite auto-bid advertising for individual listings.

steps.step_description: Advertise only listings with existing organic sales and a conversion rate above roughly 2% — Etsy Ads amplifies proven listings, it doesn't fix weak ones.
Start at $1-5/day per listing using Etsy's auto-bidding, and let the campaign run a full 30 days before judging performance.
Review ROAS after 30 days; pause listings below roughly 2x and scale budget on listings consistently above 3-4x.

Best Practice.title: Fix the listing before you fund the ad
Best Practice.description: Etsy Ads amplifies whatever conversion rate a listing already has — weak photos or pricing will just burn budget faster with ads on. Optimize the listing first, then advertise.

KPI.title: Etsy Ads ROAS
KPI.description: Return-on-ad-spend benchmark for Etsy's onsite advertising; below the low end is a reliable signal to pause.

SOP.title: Star Seller & Shop Health SOP
SOP.description: Maintaining the Star Seller badge and underlying shop-quality metrics.

steps.step_description: Reply to the first message in every new conversation thread within 24 hours, including weekends — this is the metric most sellers miss.
Ship within the stated processing time and upload valid tracking (or buy the label on Etsy) on every physical order.
Monitor the rolling 3-month average rating, and address product or fulfillment issues quickly — a single low review can swing the average when volume is low.

Best Practice.title: Set processing times you can actually hit
Best Practice.description: The badge is calculated against the processing time you set, not a fixed industry standard — an honest, slightly longer processing time you consistently beat protects the shipping metric better than an aggressive one you often miss.

KPI.title: Star Seller composite thresholds
KPI.description: The four rolling 3-month metrics Etsy evaluates for the Star Seller badge.

SOP.title: Listing & SEO Optimization SOP
SOP.description: Titles, tags, and photography tuned to Etsy search.

steps.step_description: Fill all 13 available tags with distinct long-tail phrases buyers actually search, avoiding duplication with title terms.
Front-load titles with the primary keyword phrase, and write descriptions that cover materials, dimensions, and use case.
Use 5-10 photos including scale, in-use, and detail shots — listing photo quality is one of the strongest levers on Etsy click-through rate.

Best Practice.title: Use every tag slot with a distinct phrase
Best Practice.description: Etsy indexes on all 13 tags — leaving slots empty or duplicating title keywords wastes searchable surface area that could be catching different buyer phrasing.

KPI.title: Ad-click conversion rate
KPI.description: Conversion rate benchmark for Etsy listings, most commonly cited for ad-driven traffic.

SOP.title: Shop Policies & Pricing SOP
SOP.description: Fee-aware pricing, shipping profiles, and shop policy setup.

steps.step_description: Price to a target margin after listing fees, transaction fees, payment processing, and offsite ads fee where applicable.
Build shipping profiles with realistic processing times that support the Star Seller on-time shipping metric.
Set clear return, exchange, and custom-order policies to reduce case volume and support the review rating.

Best Practice.title: Model the full fee stack before setting price
Best Practice.description: Etsy's listing fee, transaction fee, payment processing fee, and (if enrolled) offsite ads fee compound — pricing off list price alone routinely overstates margin.

KPI.title: Target margin after full fee stack
KPI.description: Minimum margin the internal SOP treats as sustainable once all Etsy fees are modeled in.
